description: Compute terrain roughness from the SRTM DEM located at /home/ga/snap_data/srtm_dem.tif and classify construction suitability. Generate a 'roughness' band by calculating the difference between the original elevation and a locally smoothed elevation surface. Create an 'abs_roughness' band representing the absolute value of the roughness. Produce a 'suitability' classification band containing at least three classes based on conditional logic applied to the absolute roughness (e.g., thresholds at 2 and 5). Save the resulting multi-band product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/terrain_roughness.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/terrain_roughness.tif.
